narrative:
Hopewell Township (precinct in Mercer County) has 732 registered voters, with 48.9% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 43.2% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 7.9%, a pronounced Republican lean of 35.2 percentage points.
